category_sources: source_facts.description says Dependency Manager for PHP; official README says Composer helps declare, manage, and install dependencies of PHP projects.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub organization use Composer as the proper product name; source_facts.name is composer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points to getcomposer.org for information and documentation, and to getcomposer.org/doc/ for usage documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository composer/composer describes itself as Dependency Management for PHP and links to getcomposer.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies PHP dependency management; official GitHub topics include php, package-manager, composer, dependency-manager, and packages.
